author: omerfirmak
content: Hey everyone, I'm not sure if this is the right place but dropping the link (https://github.com/omerfirmak/zevm) to my hand-rolled Zig EVM implementation here that I've been working on in my spare time, in case it is interesting to anyone. It is Osaka-complaint right now and benchmarks are looking pretty good. I intend to keep working on it to initially build it into a stateless block validator and support Amsterdam.
